What's Going On With Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Stock?
data.description: Super Micro Computer shares are trading lower by 1.4% during Friday's session. The company reported fourth-quarter results, gave strong guidance and approved a 10-for-1 stock split on Tuesday.

data.title: Costco Cracks Down On Non-Members Entering The Store: Will Sam's Club, BJ's Follow Suit? (UPDATED)
data.description: Costco will tighten entrance policies to prevent non-members from entering. Competitors Sam's Club and BJ's have not yet responded.
